Complete CDAS R1.8.24 Web Services API

Generated by IDLdoc

Overview Directory File Source Etc Categories Search Index Warnings Help Developer documentation

Directory: ./

Contents

.pro files

spdfadditionalmetadata__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the AdditionalMetadata element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfauthenticator__define.pro

This class represents an object that knows how to obtain authentication for the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS).

spdfbindata__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the BinData element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfcdas__define.pro

This class represents the remotely callable interface to NASA's Space Physics Data Facility (SPDF) Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS).

spdfcdasdatarequest__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the DataRequest element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfcdasdataresult__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the DataResult element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfcdaswsexample.pro

This program is an example to demonstrate calling the Coordinated Data Analysis System's REST Web Services from an Exelis Visual Information Solutions (VIS) Interactive Data Language (IDL) program.

spdfcdawebchooser.pro

This program provides a GUI for choosing datasets from CDAWeb.

spdfcdawebchooserauthenticator__define.pro

This class is the SpdfCdawebChooser's specialization of an SpdfCdawebChooserAuthenticator.

spdfcdfrequest__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the CdfRequest element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfdatasetdescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the DatasetDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfdatasetlink__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the DatasetLink element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfdatasetrequest__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the DatasetRequest element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfdataviewdescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the DataviewDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdffiledescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the FileDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfgetdata.pro

This file contains a procedure-oriented wrapper that integrates functionality from the SpdfCdas class (IDL client interface to Coordinated Data Analysis System Web Services (CDAS WSs)) and the CDAWlib library.

spdfgetdefaultsslverifypeer.pro

Gets the default value for the IDLnetURL SSL_VERIFY_PEER property based upon the runtime version of IDL.

spdfgraphrequest__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the GraphRequest element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfhttperrordialog__define.pro

This class represents an object that is used to report HTTP errors.

spdfhttperrorreporter__define.pro

This class represents an object that is used to report HTTP errors.
Notes:

  1. This class exists in both the CDAS and SSC web service IDL libraries.

spdfhttpproxy__define.pro

This class represent HTTP proxy settings.

spdfinstrumenttypedescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the InstrumentTypeDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfinventorydescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the InventoryDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfobservatorygroupdescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the ObservatoryGroupDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdftextrequest__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the TextRequest element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdfthumbnaildescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the ThumbnailDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

spdftimeinterval__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the TimeInterval element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) and Satellite Situation Center (SSC) XML schemas.

spdfvariabledescription__define.pro

This class is an IDL representation of the VariableDescription element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.



CDAS Feedback.
